descriptionInUI: Runs the in-mission scenario for SCAR flights: spawns a moving HVT signature convoy (fleeing toward the nearest city) plus decoy and clutter convoys and a light threat laydown, briefs the player (signature, ingress axis, no-strike zone, decoy warning) via F10 map marks, and watches the HVT — killed = success; reaching the city (its command vehicle slips away) or the window expiring = fail. If the SCAR target is a real armor group, that group bugs out toward the nearest city instead (killed = success, reaches the city = fail); if it's a real surface-to-surface missile site (SCUD), that launcher races to a firing position and launches on arrival (kill it first = success). The scenario is timed to the flight's TOT. Reports the outcome back to the campaign. No mis-ID scoring yet. Inert unless a SCAR flight is planned.
